title: phlebodium lanceolatum var. trichophorum
intro: Phlebodium lanceolatum var. trichophorum, commonly known as the silver polypody or trichophorum, is a variety of the Phlebodium lanceolatum fern species found in tropical and subtropical regions. It is a type of epiphytic fern used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Phlebodium lanceolatum var. trichophorum include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Phlebodium lanceolatum var. trichophorum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties.
